testcase.name: verifyBookingSuccess
testcase.system-out: ====== LOAD CONFIG ====== BASE_URL = https://demo5.cybersoft.edu.vn/ BROWSER = CHROME

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <200> but was <403>.
